sentences.english: I always make a list before going to the supermarket, otherwise I buy random things.
sentences.korean: 슈퍼마켓 가기 전에 항상 목록을 만들어요. 아니면 이것저것 사게 돼요.

sentences.english: I hate grocery shopping, so I order everything online and have it delivered.
sentences.korean: 장보기가 싫어서 다 온라인으로 주문하고 배달시켜요.

sentences.english: I go to the market early on Sunday mornings for fresh produce, and the quality is so much better than the supermarket.
sentences.korean: 일요일 아침 일찍 시장에 신선한 농산물을 사러 가요. 품질이 슈퍼마켓보다 훨씬 좋아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
